001/*

003 * contributor license agreements.  See the NOTICE file distributed with
004 * this work for additional information regarding copyright ownership.
005 * The ASF licenses this file to You under the Apache License, Version 2.0
006 * (the "License"); you may not use this file except in compliance with
007 * the License.  You may obtain a copy of the License at
008 *
009 *      http://www.apache.org/licenses/LICENSE-2.0
010 *
011 * Unless required by applicable law or agreed to in writing, software
012 * distributed under the License is distributed on an "AS IS" BASIS,
013 * WITHOUT WARRANTIES OR CONDITIONS OF ANY KIND, either express or implied.
014 * See the License for the specific language governing permissions and
015 * limitations under the License.
016 */
017package org.apache.juneau.http.header;
018
019import static org.apache.juneau.commons.utils.AssertionUtils.*;
020import static org.apache.juneau.commons.utils.ThrowableUtils.*;
021
022import java.nio.charset.*;
023import java.util.*;
024import java.util.function.*;
025
026/**
027 * Represents an HTTP <c>Proxy-Authorization</c> header.
028 *
029 * <p>
030 * Authorization credentials for connecting to a proxy.
031 *
032 * <p>
033 * <b>Beta — API subject to change:</b> This type is part of the next-generation REST client and HTTP stack
034 * ({@code org.apache.juneau.marshall.ng.*}).
035 * It is not API-frozen: binary- and source-incompatible changes may appear in the <b>next major</b> Juneau release
036 * (and possibly earlier).
037 *
038 * <h5 class='section'>See Also:</h5><ul>
039 *    <li class='link'><a class="doclink" href="https://juneau.apache.org/docs/topics/NextGenRestClient">juneau-ng REST client</a>
040 * </ul>
041 *
042 * @since 9.2.1
043 */
044@SuppressWarnings({
045   "java:S1192" // Duplicated "value" literals are HTTP header component keys; a constant would obscure the header grammar.
046})
047public class ProxyAuthorization extends HttpStringHeader {
048
049   /** The header name */
050   public static final String NAME = "Proxy-Authorization";
051
052   /**
053    * Constructor with an eager value.
054    *
055    * @param value The header value. May be <jk>null</jk>.
056    */
057   public ProxyAuthorization(String value) {
058      super(NAME, value);
059   }
060
061   /**
062    * Constructor with a lazy value supplier.
063    *
064    * @param valueSupplier Supplier for the header value. Must not be <jk>null</jk>.
065    */
066   public ProxyAuthorization(Supplier<String> valueSupplier) {
067      super(NAME, valueSupplier);
068   }
069
070   /**
071    * Static factory method with an eager value.
072    *
073    * @param value The header value. May be <jk>null</jk>.
074    * @return A new instance. Never <jk>null</jk>.
075    */
076   public static ProxyAuthorization of(String value) {
077      return new ProxyAuthorization(value);
078   }
079
080   /**
081    * Static factory method with a lazy value supplier.
082    *
083    * @param valueSupplier Supplier for the header value. Must not be <jk>null</jk>.
084    * @return A new instance. Never <jk>null</jk>.
085    */
086   public static ProxyAuthorization of(Supplier<String> valueSupplier) {
087      return new ProxyAuthorization(valueSupplier);
088   }
089
090   /**
091    * Creates a new empty {@link Builder}.
092    *
093    * @return A new builder. Never <jk>null</jk>.
094    */
095   public static Builder create() {
096      return new Builder();
097   }
098
099   /**
100    * Creates a {@link Builder} pre-populated with <c>Basic</c> credentials (base64 of <c>user:password</c>).
101    *
102    * @param user The username. Must not be <jk>null</jk>.
103    * @param password The password. Must not be <jk>null</jk>.
104    * @return A new builder. Never <jk>null</jk>.
105    */
106   public static Builder basic(String user, String password) {
107      return create().basic(user, password);
108   }
109
110   /**
111    * Creates a {@link Builder} pre-populated with <c>Bearer</c> credentials.
112    *
113    * @param token The bearer token. Must not be <jk>null</jk>.
114    * @return A new builder. Never <jk>null</jk>.
115    */
116   public static Builder bearer(String token) {
117      return create().bearer(token);
118   }
119
120   /**
121    * Creates a {@link Builder} pre-populated with a <c>Digest</c> scheme.
122    *
123    * @return A new builder. Never <jk>null</jk>.
124    */
125   public static Builder digest() {
126      return create().digest();
127   }
128
129   //------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
130   // Inner types
131   //------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
132
133   /**
134    * Fluent builder for assembling an HTTP <c>Proxy-Authorization</c> credentials value.
135    *
136    * <p>
137    * Composes the <c>scheme 1*SP ( token68 / #auth-param )</c> credentials form defined by
138    * <a class='doclink' href='https://www.rfc-editor.org/rfc/rfc7235#section-4.4'>RFC 7235 §4.4</a>.  The
139    * {@link #basic(String, String)} and {@link #bearer(String)} presets render the opaque <c>token68</c> form; the
140    * {@link #digest()} preset enables the typed Digest auth-params, which apply the correct quoting (quoted-string vs
141    * token).  {@link #param(String, String)} is a generic escape hatch so new params never require an API change.
142    * Setting a scheme preset or {@link #token(String)} clears any previously-registered auth-params and vice versa, so
143    * a built value carries either a token68 or an auth-param list, never both.
144    *
145    * <h5 class='section'>Example:</h5>
146    * <p class='bjava'>
147    *    String <jv>value</jv> = ProxyAuthorization.<jsm>create</jsm>()
148    *       .digest()
149    *       .username(<js>"Mufasa"</js>)
150    *       .realm(<js>"http-auth@example.org"</js>)
151    *       .uri(<js>"/dir/index.html"</js>)
152    *       .qop(<js>"auth"</js>)
153    *       .nc(<js>"00000001"</js>)
154    *       .response(<js>"8ca523f5e9506fed4657c9700eebdbec"</js>)
155    *       .build();
156    *    <jc>// =&gt; "Digest username=\"Mufasa\", realm=\"...\", uri=\"/dir/index.html\", qop=auth, nc=00000001, response=\"...\""</jc>
157    * </p>
158    *
159    * <h5 class='section'>See Also:</h5><ul>
160    *    <li class='jc'>{@link ProxyAuthorization}
161    *    <li class='extlink'><a class='doclink' href='https://www.rfc-editor.org/rfc/rfc7235'>RFC 7235 - HTTP/1.1 Authentication</a>
162    * </ul>
163    *
164    * @since 10.0.0
165    */
166   public static class Builder {
167
168      private String scheme;
169      private String token68;
170      private final Map<String,String> params = new LinkedHashMap<>();
171
172      /**
173       * Sets the authentication scheme (e.g. <js>"Basic"</js>, <js>"Bearer"</js>, <js>"Digest"</js>).
174       *
175       * @param value The scheme name. Must not be <jk>null</jk> or blank.
176       * @return This object.
177       * @throws IllegalArgumentException If {@code value} is <jk>null</jk> or blank.
178       */
179      public Builder scheme(String value) {
180         assertArgNotNull("value", value);
181         var v = value.trim();
182         if (v.isEmpty())
183            throw illegalArg("scheme must not be blank");
184         scheme = v;
185         return this;
186      }
187
188      /**
189       * Sets <c>Basic</c> credentials by base64-encoding <c>user:password</c> as the token68 form.
190       *
191       * @param user The username. Must not be <jk>null</jk>.
192       * @param password The password. Must not be <jk>null</jk>.
193       * @return This object.
194       */
195      public Builder basic(String user, String password) {
196         assertArgNotNull("user", user);
197         assertArgNotNull("password", password);
198         var encoded = Base64.getEncoder().encodeToString((user + ":" + password).getBytes(StandardCharsets.UTF_8));
199         return scheme("Basic").token(encoded);
200      }
201
202      /**
203       * Sets <c>Bearer</c> credentials with the supplied token as the token68 form.
204       *
205       * @param token The bearer token. Must not be <jk>null</jk>.
206       * @return This object.
207       */
208      public Builder bearer(String token) {
209         return scheme("Bearer").token(token);
210      }
211
212      /**
213       * Sets the scheme to <c>Digest</c> (typed Digest auth-params can then be chained).
214       *
215       * @return This object.
216       */
217      public Builder digest() {
218         return scheme("Digest");
219      }
220
221      /**
222       * Sets the opaque <c>token68</c> credentials form, clearing any auth-params.
223       *
224       * @param value The token68 value. Must not be <jk>null</jk>.
225       * @return This object.
226       */
227      public Builder token(String value) {
228         assertArgNotNull("value", value);
229         params.clear();
230         token68 = value;
231         return this;
232      }
233
234      /**
235       * Sets the <c>username</c> auth-param (rendered as a quoted-string).
236       *
237       * @param value The username. Must not be <jk>null</jk>.
238       * @return This object.
239       */
240      public Builder username(String value) {
241         return quotedParam("username", value);
242      }
243
244      /**
245       * Sets the <c>realm</c> auth-param (rendered as a quoted-string).
246       *
247       * @param value The realm. Must not be <jk>null</jk>.
248       * @return This object.
249       */
250      public Builder realm(String value) {
251         return quotedParam("realm", value);
252      }
253
254      /**
255       * Sets the <c>nonce</c> auth-param (rendered as a quoted-string).
256       *
257       * @param value The server nonce echoed back from the challenge. Must not be <jk>null</jk>.
258       * @return This object.
259       */
260      public Builder nonce(String value) {
261         return quotedParam("nonce", value);
262      }
263
264      /**
265       * Sets the <c>uri</c> auth-param (rendered as a quoted-string).
266       *
267       * @param value The effective request URI. Must not be <jk>null</jk>.
268       * @return This object.
269       */
270      public Builder uri(String value) {
271         return quotedParam("uri", value);
272      }
273
274      /**
275       * Sets the <c>response</c> auth-param (rendered as a quoted-string).
276       *
277       * @param value The computed digest response. Must not be <jk>null</jk>.
278       * @return This object.
279       */
280      public Builder response(String value) {
281         return quotedParam("response", value);
282      }
283
284      /**
285       * Sets the <c>cnonce</c> auth-param (rendered as a quoted-string).
286       *
287       * @param value The client nonce. Must not be <jk>null</jk>.
288       * @return This object.
289       */
290      public Builder cnonce(String value) {
291         return quotedParam("cnonce", value);
292      }
293
294      /**
295       * Sets the <c>opaque</c> auth-param (rendered as a quoted-string).
296       *
297       * @param value The opaque value echoed back from the challenge. Must not be <jk>null</jk>.
298       * @return This object.
299       */
300      public Builder opaque(String value) {
301         return quotedParam("opaque", value);
302      }
303
304      /**
305       * Sets the <c>algorithm</c> auth-param (rendered as a bare token, unquoted).
306       *
307       * @param value The algorithm (e.g. <js>"MD5"</js>, <js>"SHA-256"</js>). Must not be <jk>null</jk>.
308       * @return This object.
309       */
310      public Builder algorithm(String value) {
311         return tokenParam("algorithm", value);
312      }
313
314      /**
315       * Sets the <c>qop</c> auth-param (rendered as a bare token, unquoted; a single value in credentials).
316       *
317       * @param value The quality-of-protection token (e.g. <js>"auth"</js>). Must not be <jk>null</jk>.
318       * @return This object.
319       */
320      public Builder qop(String value) {
321         return tokenParam("qop", value);
322      }
323
324      /**
325       * Sets the <c>nc</c> (nonce-count) auth-param (rendered as a bare token, unquoted).
326       *
327       * @param value The 8-digit hex nonce-count (e.g. <js>"00000001"</js>). Must not be <jk>null</jk>.
328       * @return This object.
329       */
330      public Builder nc(String value) {
331         return tokenParam("nc", value);
332      }
333
334      /**
335       * Generic escape hatch for setting any auth-param by name, rendered as a quoted-string.
336       *
337       * <p>
338       * Replaces any previously-registered value for the same param while preserving its original position, and
339       * clears any previously-set {@link #token(String) token68}.
340       *
341       * @param name The auth-param name. Must not be <jk>null</jk> or blank.
342       * @param value The auth-param value (quoted automatically). Must not be <jk>null</jk>.
343       * @return This object.
344       * @throws IllegalArgumentException If {@code name} is <jk>null</jk> or blank.
345       */
346      public Builder param(String name, String value) {
347         return quotedParam(name, value);
348      }
349
350      private Builder quotedParam(String name, String value) {
351         assertArgNotNull("value", value);
352         token68 = null;
353         params.put(cleanName(name), q(value));
354         return this;
355      }
356
357      private Builder tokenParam(String name, String value) {
358         assertArgNotNull("value", value);
359         token68 = null;
360         params.put(cleanName(name), value);
361         return this;
362      }
363
364      private static String cleanName(String name) {
365         assertArgNotNull("name", name);
366         var n = name.trim();
367         if (n.isEmpty())
368            throw illegalArg("auth-param name must not be blank");
369         return n;
370      }
371
372      private static String q(String value) {
373         var sb = new StringBuilder(value.length() + 2);
374         sb.append('"');
375         for (var i = 0; i < value.length(); i++) {
376            var c = value.charAt(i);
377            if (c == '\\' || c == '"')
378               sb.append('\\');
379            sb.append(c);
380         }
381         sb.append('"');
382         return sb.toString();
383      }
384
385      /**
386       * Builds the rendered <c>Proxy-Authorization</c> credentials value.
387       *
388       * <p>
389       * Returns an empty string when no scheme has been registered.
390       *
391       * @return The header value. Never <jk>null</jk>.
392       */
393      public String build() {
394         if (scheme == null)
395            return "";
396         var sb = new StringBuilder(scheme);
397         if (token68 != null) {
398            sb.append(' ').append(token68);
399         } else if (! params.isEmpty()) {
400            sb.append(' ');
401            var parts = new ArrayList<String>(params.size());
402            params.forEach((k, v) -> parts.add(k + "=" + v));
403            sb.append(String.join(", ", parts));
404         }
405         return sb.toString();
406      }
407
408      /**
409       * Builds a {@link ProxyAuthorization} header bean directly from this builder.
410       *
411       * @return A {@link ProxyAuthorization} carrying {@link #build()}. Never <jk>null</jk>.
412       */
413      public ProxyAuthorization toHeader() {
414         return ProxyAuthorization.of(build());
415      }
416
417      @Override
418      public String toString() {
419         return build();
420      }
421   }
422}
